title: Introduction & Cluster Status
at_stake: Orients the operator on the 6-node, 2-DC topology and confirms all nodes are UN before any demo.

title: Replication Factors
at_stake: Teaches how RF per keyspace determines how many node losses data can survive.

title: Consistency Levels
at_stake: Shows EACH_QUORUM failing when a DC loses quorum while LOCAL_QUORUM keeps serving — the core availability tradeoff.

title: Node Failures
at_stake: Proves RF=3 survives one node down: reads/writes continue uninterrupted under QUORUM.

title: Hinted Handoff & Entropy Visualization
at_stake: Visualizes how a down node accumulates hints and catches up on recovery, preventing data loss.

title: Read Repair
at_stake: Demonstrates reads silently reconciling stale replicas, healing divergence on the fly.

title: Anti-Entropy Repair
at_stake: Explains scheduled nodetool repair as the backstop that guarantees eventual consistency across all replicas.

title: Token Ring & Consistent Hashing
at_stake: Shows how vnodes/token ranges distribute data so an SRE can reason about ownership and balance.

title: Write Path Trace
at_stake: Traces commitlog + memtable + coordinator fan-out so engineers understand write durability and latency.

title: Read Path Trace
at_stake: Traces the read path (bloom filter, cache, SSTable merge) to explain read latency and tuning levers.

title: Node Recovery — The Full Picture
at_stake: Ties hints + read repair + anti-entropy together into the complete self-healing recovery story.

title: Tombstones & Shadowed Data
at_stake: Warns how deletes leave tombstones that hurt read performance and can resurrect data if GC grace is mishandled.

title: Lightweight Transactions (LWT) - The Race Condition Story
at_stake: Shows Paxos-backed compare-and-set preventing duplicate inserts under concurrency.

title: Summary & Health Check
at_stake: Recaps Part 1 and runs a final health check so the operator confirms cluster integrity.

title: The Ghost Rack (Double Rack Failure)
at_stake: Reveals what happens when both seed nodes (one per DC) drop simultaneously — rack-aware placement limits.

title: Schema Disagreement
at_stake: Teaches detecting and resolving schema version mismatches that can silently break a cluster.

title: Gossip Protocol & Failure Detection
at_stake: Explains how gossip and the phi-accrual detector decide a node is down, governing failover timing.

title: The Zombie Node (Network Partition)
at_stake: Illustrates split-brain risk when a node is partitioned but still thinks it is alive.

title: Storage Attached Indexing (SAI) - Deep Dive
at_stake: Shows SAI enabling flexible secondary-index queries without the anti-patterns of legacy 2i.

title: JSON Fundamentals
at_stake: Demonstrates native CQL JSON insert/select so developers can store document-shaped data.

title: JSON Enterprise Patterns
at_stake: Covers production JSON modeling patterns (nested types, collections) for real document workloads.

title: Vector Search & AI Readiness
at_stake: Proves HCD can store embeddings and do ANN vector search — the RAG/AI-platform value proposition.

title: Mixed Real-time Operations (CRUD + Upsert)
at_stake: Shows upsert semantics and mixed CRUD load behaving correctly under live operations.

title: Compaction: The Entropy Cleaner
at_stake: Explains how compaction merges SSTables and purges tombstones to reclaim space and speed reads.

title: Kill an Entire Datacenter (Multi-DC Failover)
at_stake: Proves the surviving DC serves traffic when an entire datacenter goes dark — DR cornerstone.

title: Grand Finale - The Self-Healing Database
at_stake: Combines failure + automatic recovery into one narrative showing the cluster heals without manual intervention.

title: Change Data Capture (CDC)
at_stake: Shows CDC emitting mutation logs so downstream systems (Kafka/ETL) can stream changes.

title: Audit Logging
at_stake: Demonstrates capturing who-did-what for compliance and forensic investigation.

title: Guardrails - Protecting the Database from Misuse
at_stake: Shows guardrails blocking dangerous queries (large batches, unbounded reads) before they harm the cluster.

title: Data Modeling Anti-Patterns
at_stake: Teaches why wide partitions and unbounded growth kill performance — the most common design mistake.

title: Latency Comparison - The Cost of Consistency
at_stake: Quantifies the latency price of stronger consistency levels so teams pick the right CL per workload.

title: Time-Series Use Case
at_stake: Models time-series data with proper bucketing/TTL — a top real-world HCD workload.

title: Compaction Strategies Deep Dive
at_stake: Compares STCS/LCS/TWCS so an operator chooses compaction matching their read/write/TTL pattern.

title: Compression Strategies
at_stake: Shows compression tradeoffs (LZ4/Zstd) balancing disk savings against CPU cost.

title: Live Failover Under Load
at_stake: Proves a node can fail mid-traffic with the application seeing no errors — zero-downtime resilience.

title: Multi-DC Write Conflict Resolution
at_stake: Explains last-write-wins timestamp conflict resolution across DCs and its pitfalls.

title: Adding a New Datacenter Live
at_stake: Shows online DC expansion plus a chaos test proving the join survives node failures during rebuild.

title: Backup & Restore
at_stake: Validates snapshot backup and restore by wiping a table and recovering it — RPO/RTO proof.

title: Rolling Restart (Zero-Downtime Maintenance)
at_stake: Demonstrates patching/upgrading nodes one at a time with no service interruption.

title: Rate Limiting & Back-Pressure (Ops Monitoring)
at_stake: Shows back-pressure protecting the cluster from overload and how to watch it in Grafana.

title: Repair Strategies
at_stake: Compares full/incremental/subrange repair so ops pick the least disruptive anti-entropy method.

title: Stress Testing & Capacity Planning
at_stake: Uses cassandra-stress to size the cluster and find the throughput ceiling before production.

title: Security Fundamentals
at_stake: Introduces auth/RBAC/TLS concepts that production deployments must enable.

title: Geographic Visualization & Token Ownership
at_stake: Maps token ranges to DCs/racks visually so operators reason about data locality and balance.

title: Driver Policies — The Client-Side of Entropy
at_stake: Shows token-aware + DC-aware load balancing on the client cuts latency and avoids cross-DC hops.

title: Speculative Execution — Masking Latency Spikes
at_stake: Demonstrates the driver firing redundant requests to hide a slow replica's tail latency.

title: Live DC Failover with Driver
at_stake: Proves the driver automatically routes to the remote DC when the local DC dies — client-side DR.

title: Retry Policies Under Partition
at_stake: Shows driver retry policies recovering from a hung/slow node without surfacing errors to the app.

title: Parts 1-5 Checkpoint
at_stake: Consolidates the distributed-systems concepts learned so far into a coherent mental model.

title: ACID vs HCD: What 'Transactions' Really Mean Here
at_stake: Corrects the dangerous assumption that HCD offers RDBMS ACID — sets correct expectations.

title: LOGGED vs UNLOGGED BATCH — Atomicity Without Isolation
at_stake: Clarifies that LOGGED batches give atomicity but not isolation, and warns against batch misuse.

title: The Lost Update Problem — Why Read-Modify-Write Needs LWT
at_stake: Demonstrates concurrent read-modify-write losing updates unless guarded by LWT compare-and-set.

title: Banking: Instant Payment Between Two Banks
at_stake: Models a money transfer to show why naive cross-account writes need LWT/saga for correctness.

title: The Saga Pattern: Supplier/Customer Order Flow
at_stake: Teaches sagas with compensating actions as the way to coordinate multi-step business flows without distributed transactions.

title: Consistency Decision Framework
at_stake: Gives a decision tree for choosing CL/RF/LWT/saga per use case — the practical takeaway of Part 6.

title: HCD Data API (REST/JSON Document Access)
at_stake: Shows the JSON/REST Document API on port 8181 letting app devs use HCD like a document database.

title: Multi-Tenant Isolation (End-to-End)
at_stake: Demonstrates keyspace/RBAC-based tenant isolation so one customer cannot read another's data.

title: Node Decommission (Controlled Shrink)
at_stake: Shows safely shrinking the cluster by draining and removing a node without data loss.

title: Disaster Recovery Runbook
at_stake: Walks an end-to-end DR runbook: simulate a disaster, then restore — proving documented recovery works.

title: Silent Data Corruption Detection
at_stake: Shows checksums/scrub catching bit-rot before it propagates — protects long-term data integrity.

title: Cross-Service Saga (Simulated External Services)
at_stake: Demonstrates the transactional-outbox + saga pattern coordinating HCD with external microservices reliably.

title: LWT Contention Under Load
at_stake: Shows LWT throughput collapsing under hot-key contention — a critical capacity-planning warning.

title: Repair Deep-Dive (The Most Critical Ops Procedure)
at_stake: Deep repair walkthrough proving anti-entropy reconciles a node that missed writes while down.

title: Live RBAC Demo (Role-Based Access Control)
at_stake: Creates roles and grants live, showing least-privilege access control enforced by the database.

title: Encryption at Rest (Transparent Data Encryption)
at_stake: Demonstrates TDE so data on disk is unreadable if drives are stolen — compliance requirement.

title: Commitlog Durability & Crash Recovery
at_stake: Proves an un-flushed write survives a hard crash via commitlog replay — durability guarantee.

title: Hint Expiration & Data Gaps
at_stake: Warns that hints expire after max_hint_window, so a long-down node needs repair to avoid permanent gaps.

title: Dynamic Replication Factor Change
at_stake: Shows altering RF live plus the mandatory repair afterward to avoid under-replicated reads.

title: Streaming & Bootstrap Monitoring
at_stake: Teaches monitoring nodetool netstats during bootstrap so ops know when a new node is truly ready.

title: Materialized Views — Server-Side Denormalization
at_stake: Shows MVs maintaining alternate query tables automatically, with caveats on their consistency cost.

title: Nodetool Ops Deep-Dive — Systematic Troubleshooting
at_stake: A field guide to nodetool diagnostics (tpstats, info, cfstats) for triaging a struggling cluster.

title: Cross-DC Consistency Window
at_stake: Measures the replication lag window between DCs so apps understand cross-DC staleness.

title: Bloom Filter & Cache Tuning
at_stake: Shows tuning bloom-filter FP rate and caches to cut disk reads and improve read latency.

title: DORA Ransomware — Kill Chain & Infrastructure Setup
at_stake: Frames the ransomware kill chain and provisions WORM buckets with Object Lock — the DORA defense setup.

title: DORA Ransomware — Backup to WORM & Integrity Verification
at_stake: Uploads snapshots to immutable WORM storage with checksums, proving backups attackers cannot delete.

title: DORA Ransomware — Commitlog Archiving to WORM
at_stake: Archives commitlogs to WORM for point-in-time recovery beyond the last snapshot — tightens RPO.

title: DORA Ransomware — The Attack Simulation
at_stake: Simulates an attacker truncating all tables across every replica — showing in-cluster replication is no ransomware defense.

title: DORA Ransomware — Recovery from WORM Backups
at_stake: Restores the wiped data from immutable WORM backups, proving recoverability after a successful attack.

title: DORA Ransomware — DC Failover Under Attack
at_stake: Shows failover/isolation tactics to keep serving from a clean DC while an attack is contained.

title: DORA Ransomware — DORA Compliance Scorecard & K8s Auto-Healing
at_stake: Scores the demo against DORA resilience requirements and shows K8ssandra auto-healing — the compliance wrap-up.

title: Counter Columns
at_stake: Demonstrates distributed counters and their non-idempotent, non-LWT semantics caveats.

title: Prepared Statements & Driver Best Practices
at_stake: Shows prepared statements cutting parse overhead and preventing CQL injection — a core perf/security practice.

title: JVM & GC Tuning
at_stake: Explains heap/GC tuning (G1/ZGC) to avoid stop-the-world pauses that cause latency spikes.

title: CQL Aggregation & Analytics Functions
at_stake: Shows server-side aggregations and Cassandra 5.0 scalar math functions reducing client-side compute.

title: Collection Types Deep-Dive (Frozen vs Non-Frozen)
at_stake: Clarifies frozen vs non-frozen collection tradeoffs (tombstones, update granularity) for correct modeling.

title: Dynamic Data Masking (DDM)
at_stake: Shows column-level masking redacting PII for unprivileged roles — privacy compliance without app changes.

title: CIDR / IP Allowlist Authorizer
at_stake: Restricts which source IP ranges a role may connect from — network-layer access control.

title: Datacenter-Level Role Restrictions
at_stake: Confines a role to specific datacenters, enforcing data-residency and blast-radius limits.

title: mTLS Authentication & External RBAC
at_stake: Authenticates clients by certificate identity (SPIFFE) instead of passwords — zero-trust client auth.

title: Paxos v2 Consensus (Benchmark)
at_stake: Benchmarks Paxos v2's reduced round-trips, showing faster LWT throughput in HCD 2.0.

title: Authentication Hardening
at_stake: Shows pre-hashed passwords, login rate limiting, and bulk grants — hardening auth against brute force.

title: PEM SSL & Cert-Based Internode Auth
at_stake: Encrypts and authenticates internode traffic with PEM certs, preventing rogue nodes from joining.

title: Audit Logging 2.0 Hardening
at_stake: Demonstrates hardened, tamper-resistant audit logging for regulated environments.

title: Java 17 Runtime & Supply-Chain Posture
at_stake: Confirms the Java 17 base and reviews CVE/supply-chain posture — the security-provenance story.
